mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friendship (requester_id, addressee_id, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{requesterId}, #{addresseeId}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT f.*, r.nickname as requester_nickname, rp.profile_image_url as requester_profile_image, r.is_online as requester_is_online, r.last_seen_at as requester_last_seen_at, a.nickname as addressee_nickname, ap.profile_image_url as addressee_profile_image, a.is_online as addressee_is_online, a.last_seen_at as addressee_last_seen_at FROM friendship f JOIN user r ON f.requester_id = r.id LEFT JOIN profile rp ON r.id = rp.user_id JOIN user a ON f.addressee_id = a.id LEFT JOIN profile ap ON a.id = ap.user_id WHERE f.id = #{id}

SELECT f.*, r.nickname as requester_nickname, rp.profile_image_url as requester_profile_image, r.is_online as requester_is_online, r.last_seen_at as requester_last_seen_at, a.nickname as addressee_nickname, ap.profile_image_url as addressee_profile_image, a.is_online as addressee_is_online, a.last_seen_at as addressee_last_seen_at FROM friendship f JOIN user r ON f.requester_id = r.id LEFT JOIN profile rp ON r.id = rp.user_id JOIN user a ON f.addressee_id = a.id LEFT JOIN profile ap ON a.id = ap.user_id WHERE (f.requester_id = #{userId1} AND f.addressee_id = #{userId2}) OR (f.requester_id = #{userId2} AND f.addressee_id = #{userId1})

SELECT f.*, r.nickname as requester_nickname, rp.profile_image_url as requester_profile_image, r.is_online as requester_is_online, r.last_seen_at as requester_last_seen_at, a.nickname as addressee_nickname, ap.profile_image_url as addressee_profile_image, a.is_online as addressee_is_online, a.last_seen_at as addressee_last_seen_at FROM friendship f JOIN user r ON f.requester_id = r.id LEFT JOIN profile rp ON r.id = rp.user_id JOIN user a ON f.addressee_id = a.id LEFT JOIN profile ap ON a.id = ap.user_id WHERE f.requester_id = #{requesterId} AND f.addressee_id = #{addresseeId}

SELECT f.*, r.nickname as requester_nickname, rp.profile_image_url as requester_profile_image, r.is_online as requester_is_online, r.last_seen_at as requester_last_seen_at, a.nickname as addressee_nickname, ap.profile_image_url as addressee_profile_image, a.is_online as addressee_is_online, a.last_seen_at as addressee_last_seen_at FROM friendship f JOIN user r ON f.requester_id = r.id LEFT JOIN profile rp ON r.id = rp.user_id JOIN user a ON f.addressee_id = a.id LEFT JOIN profile ap ON a.id = ap.user_id WHERE f.addressee_id = #{addresseeId} AND f.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY f.created_at DESC

SELECT f.*, r.nickname as requester_nickname, rp.profile_image_url as requester_profile_image, r.is_online as requester_is_online, r.last_seen_at as requester_last_seen_at, a.nickname as addressee_nickname, ap.profile_image_url as addressee_profile_image, a.is_online as addressee_is_online, a.last_seen_at as addressee_last_seen_at FROM friendship f JOIN user r ON f.requester_id = r.id LEFT JOIN profile rp ON r.id = rp.user_id JOIN user a ON f.addressee_id = a.id LEFT JOIN profile ap ON a.id = ap.user_id WHERE f.requester_id = #{requesterId} AND f.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY f.created_at DESC

SELECT f.*, r.nickname as requester_nickname, rp.profile_image_url as requester_profile_image, r.is_online as requester_is_online, r.last_seen_at as requester_last_seen_at, a.nickname as addressee_nickname, ap.profile_image_url as addressee_profile_image, a.is_online as addressee_is_online, a.last_seen_at as addressee_last_seen_at FROM friendship f JOIN user r ON f.requester_id = r.id LEFT JOIN profile rp ON r.id = rp.user_id JOIN user a ON f.addressee_id = a.id LEFT JOIN profile ap ON a.id = ap.user_id WHERE (f.requester_id = #{userId} OR f.addressee_id = #{userId}) AND f.status = 'ACCEPTED' ORDER BY f.updated_at DESC

SELECT f.*, r.nickname as requester_nickname, rp.profile_image_url as requester_profile_image, r.is_online as requester_is_online, r.last_seen_at as requester_last_seen_at, a.nickname as addressee_nickname, ap.profile_image_url as addressee_profile_image, a.is_online as addressee_is_online, a.last_seen_at as addressee_last_seen_at FROM friendship f JOIN user r ON f.requester_id = r.id LEFT JOIN profile rp ON r.id = rp.user_id JOIN user a ON f.addressee_id = a.id LEFT JOIN profile ap ON a.id = ap.user_id WHERE f.id = #{friendshipId} AND (f.requester_id = #{userId} OR f.addressee_id = #{userId})
